assessor_1_raw: E-commerce ranker: methodologically sound with IPW position bias correction, temporal split, frequency stratification, and human annotation sanity check. LambdaMART baseline with equivalent tuning is fair. NDCG@10 with bootstrap CIs by decile is rigorous. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Well-designed search ranking experiment. The propensity model per position is the standard Unbiased LTR approach. Per-decile NDCG is an excellent confound check. Human annotation validation is properly isolated. Scope correctly bounded. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: The design correctly uses IPW for both training and evaluation — symmetric debiasing. The frequency decile stratification detects non-uniform improvements. The scope is honest about offline evaluation limitations. No methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
